title: Bordhell-type fuel slug
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Bordhell-type [[Fuel slug/Legends|fuel slugs]]''' were a form of [[Fuel/Legends|fuel]] used extensively by the [[Xim's empire|empire]] of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot]]. Though long-obsolete by [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], in their time they provided Xim's warships with unmatched range and speed.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2012-04-03 -->''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''

[[Category:Fuels]]
